name: mapper-techniques-product-eval
description: Drop-in harness config for comparing Mapper OS technique variants by built product quality, not packet checker success.

budget.unblockPolicy: Only fix identical environment blockers across all variants. Do not coach product choices mid-run.

task.name: local-rag-workbench
task.instruction: Build the selected product locally from this Buildprint packet. Use the packet as the governing source. Produce a runnable local artifact, run the strongest local gates you can, test the product like a real first-time user, and write a concise handover. Do not optimize for proof artifacts; optimize for a usable product.

variants.label: Goal-Kernel Mapper OS
variants.notes: Goal condition + acceptance criteria + verification loop.

variants.label: Simulation-First Mapper OS
variants.notes: Simulate first user session, build from failure map, replay as verification.

variants.label: Architecture-Garden Mapper OS
variants.notes: Feature slice plus bounded architecture/refactor/UX gardening. Commit may not exist yet; path can point to dirty worktree.

criticalRegressions: scope silently shrank from the source promise
